problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene may resolve Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
